items.topic_thesis: Infinite games do not need more dashboards; they need a higher rate of error digestion.
items.angle: Name the concept, explain it plainly, and show why it matters now.
items.hook: The mistake leaders keep making is thinking infinite games do not need more dashboards; they need a higher rate of error digestion.

items.topic_thesis: Management theater is what happens when ritual capacity grows faster than trust.
items.angle: Do not summarize the news; diagnose the pattern underneath it.
items.hook: Most people are misreading what this story is actually about. management theater is what happens when ritual capacity grows faster than trust.

items.topic_thesis: If your rituals do not make it easier to change your mind in public, they are theater.
items.angle: Start with a recurring problem and end with a usable move.
items.hook: If your team keeps repeating the same failure, stop adding process. if your rituals do not make it easier to change your mind in public, they are theater.
